transcript.scoringWindow: WEBVTT 00:00:17.280 --> 00:00:21.440 Welcome to K-Buzz, your daily source for the latest Korean entertainment news. 00:00:21.760 --> 00:00:26.239 We're your hosts bringing you all the hottest updates from the K-pop and K-drama world. 00:00:26.480 --> 00:00:31.440 Today is July 8th, 2026, and we've got some incredible stories to share with you. 00:00:31.679 --> 00:00:32.560 Let's dive right in. 00:00:32.799 --> 00:00:40.880 New Jeans is facing serious legal trouble in the United States as their hit song ETA has been hit with a copyright infringement lawsuit. 00:00:41.119 --> 00:00:53.439 The American copyright management company, All Surface Publishing, filed the suit in California federal court, claiming the track illegally used elements from DJ Debonair Samir's 2005 song Samir's Theme. 00:00:53.600 --> 00:01:07.120 The lawsuit alleges that distinctive horn melodies with syncopation, 16th note rhythm structures, and biased drum patterns were copied without permission, targeting producer 250, lyricist Benzino, Hi B.E. 00:01:07.359 --> 00:01:12.319 Adore, production company Bana, and even Apple for their advertising collaboration. 00:01:13.200 --> 00:01:24.719 Adore responded by stating the track was sourced through Bana during Minhe Jin's tenure as CEO, and they are currently reviewing internal materials to determine whether proper similarity checks were conducted at the time. 00:01:26.159 --> 00:01:26.719 Samaya. 00:01:27.040 --> 00:01:34.959 Actor Lee Sungi and actress Lee Dayan welcomed their second child, a baby boy, on July 7th, making them parents of two children. 00:01:35.519 --> 00:01:42.799 Both mother and baby are reported to be in healthy condition, with Lee Sungi staying by his wife's side throughout the delivery and recovery process. 00:01:43.680 --> 00:01:52.879 The couple married in April of 2023 and welcomed their first daughter in February 2024, now completing their family with one son and one daughter. 00:01:53.840 --> 00:02:10.800 This joyful news comes as Lee Sunghe prepares for his first solo concert in 13 years, scheduled for October 24th and 25th, at Blue Square in Seoul, though the happy occasion is shadowed by his ongoing legal dispute over a 105 billion one luxury villa lease contract. 00:02:11.759 --> 00:02:23.840 Musical actress and singer Okeiu Hyun has broken her silence on the Okei Jangpan controversy, a scandal from four years ago that she says continues to haunt her despite fading from public memory. 00:02:24.080 --> 00:02:38.960 The controversy erupted in 2022 when fellow musical actor Kim Ho young posted cryptic messages on social media suggesting improper influence in the casting of the musical Elizabeth, leading to widespread speculation about Okju Hyun's involvement. 00:02:39.199 --> 00:02:48.400 Although Okju Hyun initially pursued legal action for defamation, she withdrew the complaint out of consideration for the musical industry, but the issue was never fully resolved. 00:02:48.719 --> 00:03:03.199 In her recent statement, she emphasized that time alone doesn't erase false narratives and expressed hope that she will no longer be consumed as a meme or joke, while Kim Ho-young, currently in the United States, has remained silent on the matter. 00:03:03.840 --> 00:03:05.280 So for event. 00:03:05.840 --> 00:03:18.879 BTS continues to elevate Korean cultural heritage on the global stage through their collaboration with London's British Museum for the City London project, centered on their album A Ray Rang. 00:03:19.439 --> 00:03:39.840 The museum is hosting an interactive program called Korea Gallery Trail through July 23rd, which connects BTS's music with significant Korean artifacts, including the sarang bang symbolizing new beginnings, the moonjar representing universal love, intricate gold earrings showcasing craftsmanship, and roof tiles embodying cultural vitality. 00:03:40.080 --> 00:03:52.639 A special section inspired by track number 29 from A Ray Rang features Scylla Dynasty artifacts linked to the sound of the Emil Bell, creating a unique synergy between contemporary K-pop and ancient Korean treasures. 00:03:53.520 --> 00:04:04.560 This cultural initiative follows BTS's recent London concert at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium on July 7th, with upcoming performances scheduled in Munich and Paris as part of their R. 00:04:06.560 --> 00:04:09.599 Our featured song today is Midnight Ticket by Joan. 00:04:09.840 --> 00:04:16.079 K a captivating pop R and B track that perfectly captures the essence of a romantic summer night. 00:04:16.240 --> 00:04:20.079 With its smooth EP sound, rich drum grooves, and Joan. 00:04:20.399 --> 00:04:26.399 K's silky vocals inviting someone special into an intimate moment, this is a track you won't want to miss. 00:04:26.639 --> 00:04:27.839 Here's a preview. 00:05:37.279 --> 00:05:44.639 Then traces his growth from a playful child to a responsible artist through nostalgic footage, set to an upbeat rhythm. 00:05:44.959 --> 00:05:58.639 International media, including Vogue Singapore, have praised the track for its special depth and intimate glimpse into Vernon's inner world, with production contributions from talented producers Carara, Han Jungin, and Rob Roy. 00:05:58.959 --> 00:06:09.600 V8 will kick off their solo concert series 2026, Vernon the Eighth, V8 Live, on July 11th and 12th at Kintex in Goyang, Gyonggi Province. 00:06:10.480 --> 00:06:23.120 ITS has achieved a major career milestone as their 14th mini album, Golden Hour Part 5, debuted at number one on the Billboard 200 chart with 223,000 album sales in its first week. 00:06:23.360 --> 00:06:33.759 This marks the highest first-week US sales figure in the group's history and sets a new record for the most top 10 entries on the Billboard, 200 among K-pop groups in the 2020s. 00:06:34.000 --> 00:06:47.839 The album also topped multiple other Billboard charts, including World Albums and Artist 100, while domestically, it sold over 1.88 million copies in its initial release period, making it their seventh consecutive million-seller album. 00:06:48.079 --> 00:07:00.399 Member Sans' powerful performance in the title track Bad, particularly a viral shirtless dance moment dubbed the Die Together part by fans, has been dominating social media algorithms across Instagram reels and YouTube shorts. 00:07:02.959 --> 00:07:15.519 Netflix's dark fantasy series Dongung promises to deliver chilling horror and spectacular action when it premieres on July 17th, starring Nam Ju Hyuk, Ro Yunseo, and Joe Sung-woo. 00:07:15.839 --> 00:07:32.000 The series follows a man with supernatural abilities and a palace made with secrets as they hunt down a curse threatening the royal bloodline, with Nam Ju Hyuk's character able to cross between the spirit world and reality, while Ro Yun-seo's character can hear ghostly voices. 00:07:32.319 --> 00:07:44.879 Director Choi Jung Yu emphasized the meticulous design of the dual worlds, filming the same locations in both winter and summer, and building duplicate sets to clearly differentiate between the spirit realm and reality. 00:07:45.120 --> 00:07:59.360 Nam Ju Hyuk, in his first project since military discharge, committed fully to the role by performing intense water scenes in freezing winter temperatures and delivering powerful action sequences, particularly a memorable fight scene against 13 Palace Maids. 00:08:01.279 --> 00:08:13.680 Boy Group A Hope celebrated their first debut anniversary with a confident comeback, releasing their third mini-album, Run to You, that showcases both their signature refreshing sound and a more powerful, mature side. 00:08:14.000 --> 00:08:28.800 The title track combines electronic band sounds with synthpop to express the unwavering energy of running straight toward a single person without hesitation, featuring choreography that symbolizes the group's journey forward, including a memorable shoulder-holding walking motion. 00:08:29.199 --> 00:08:39.120 Members Cha Wunki, Pog Han, and Pak Ju Won participated in writing the lyrics for the B-side track Our Story, pouring their genuine feelings for fans into the composition. 00:08:39.600 --> 00:08:56.720 The group has shown remarkable growth since debut, achieving record-breaking initial sales of 360,000 copies with their first album and 380,000 with their second, attributing their success to their diverse range of concepts from refreshing to powerful that showcase different terms. 00:08:58.639 --> 00:09:07.600 JTBC has resolved its payment crisis by completing overdue payments for appearance fees and production costs after receiving court approval last week. 00:09:08.159 --> 00:09:18.000 The broadcaster announced that dispatch fees, service fees, and various entertainment program appearance fees that were delayed due to court approval procedures have now been fully paid. 00:09:18.320 --> 00:09:32.159 JTBC fell into default on June 12th after failing to repay$206 billion in securitization loans, leading parent company Jungang Holdings, and several affiliates, including Megabox, to file for corporate rehabilitation. 00:09:32.399 --> 00:09:45.279 However, JTBC uniquely applied for the autonomous restructuring support program alongside rehabilitation proceedings, allowing the company to lead its own recovery efforts, which the court approved on June 30th. 00:09:46.000 --> 00:09:48.159 That wraps up today's episode of K-Buzz. 00:09:48.399 --> 00:09:52.159 Thanks for tuning in to get your daily dose of Korean entertainment news. 00:09:52.320 --> 00:09:58.080 Don't forget to subscribe to stay updated on all the latest happenings in the K-pop and K drama world. 00:09:58.320 --> 00:10:04.559 We'll be back tomorrow with more exciting stories and updates, so make sure to tune in for the next episode of K-Buzz. 00:10:04.879 --> 00:10:10.240 Until then, stay tuned to All Things Korean Entertainment, and we'll catch

relevance.rationale: This is a Korean entertainment news roundup covering K-pop, K-drama, and celebrity gossip with no substantive political or news/policy content — the copyright lawsuit mentioned is a civil entertainment industry matter, not a political or legislative development.

structure.rationale: The episode moves between LeBron free agency analysis and World Cup content with a mid-segment ad break, but the whiteboard segment is disorganized and the host loses his place multiple times.

relevance.rationale: This episode is entirely sports analysis — NBA free agency speculation and World Cup predictions — with no substantive connection to news or political events.

clipability.rationale: The Kyrie-for-Harden trade pitch is a usable standalone moment, but most segments require prior setup about the whiteboard or ongoing free agency context to land.

card.tagline: Nick Wright makes the case for LeBron returning to Cleveland with Kyrie
card.description: Wright breaks down why the Cavaliers are LeBron's most likely landing spot and pitches a Harden-for-Kyrie trade to seal the deal.
card.reason: Because you follow NBA free agency and the LeBron sweepstakes
